title: Some clean-up in `show` pass
body:
I found the `gen_portbox` function in `show.c` very hard to read, so this is an attempt at making it bit more comprehensible. It's split into a couple of small commits which hopefully make for easy review.

The first commit is the only one that should bring a functional change -- fixing a minor discrepancy in portbox bit ranges. The remaining commits should keep the output of `show` exactly the same. I tested that on a synthesis run of `picorv32`, I can test on other corpuses if you suggest some.
